Bio.cert_1: Certified Fitness Coach (EREPS Level 3 and Level 4)
Bio.cert_3: Master in Therapeutic Nutrition, Researcher in Nutrition & Supplements, Biochemistry Professor
Bio.description: Former Bodybuilding Champion. I combine field experience with a scientific approach for physical transformation, sports nutrition, body recomposition, and the optimization of performance and health.

Manifesto.label: Identity
Manifesto.p1: More than just a program, a methodology forged through experience and science. Every movement, every calorie is optimized for one goal: your result.
Manifesto.p2: Specializing in therapeutic nutrition and biochemistry, I decode your body's mechanisms to release its full athletic potential.
Manifesto.p3: Discipline is not an option. It's the price of transformation.

Pillars.label: Methodology
Pillars.subtext: A holistic approach combining science, data, and athletic rigor.
Pillars.p1_desc: 100% personalized programs based on biomechanics, progressive intensity, and data analysis.
Pillars.p2_desc: Scientifically optimized nutritional plans for performance, metabolic health, and longevity.
Pillars.p3_desc: Forge a mental steel. Mental strength is the engine that transforms efforts into lasting results.

Contact.label: Application Portal
Contact.subtext: I only take on truly determined individuals. If you're ready to follow the protocol, start here.
Contact.success_p: Get ready. Your journey starts within 24 hours.

Pricing.subtext: Access to elite expertise. No compromises, just results.

ordinaire.name: Standard Pack
ordinaire.desc: The essentials to start your transformation with the basics of YouOtmani coaching.

golden.name: Golden Pack
golden.desc: The standard of excellence. Intensive monitoring for fast and lasting results.

elite.name: Elite Pack
elite.desc: The ultimate experience. Total access to my methodology and priority daily follow-ups.
